ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "ps_no" TEXT /* Problem Statement number */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization initiating the project */,
  "problem_statement" TEXT /* Brief problem statement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the project (e.g., SOFTWARE, INFRASTRUCTURE) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., IN PROGRESS, COMPLETED) */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Name of the project lead */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred so far */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., government, private, grant) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the member is working on */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the member started working on the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the member is expected to complete their work */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the team member (e.g., JUNIOR, SENIOR) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the team member (e.g., FULL_TIME, PART_TIME) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., COMPLETED, IN PROGRESS) */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date the milestone was completed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the milestone */,
  "responsible_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member responsible for the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_responsible_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the resource is allocated to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., HUMAN, EQUIPMENT, SOFTWARE) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., ALLOCATED, DEALLOCATED, IN_USE) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the resource is expected to be returned or reallocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_title" TEXT /* Title of the feedback */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Any suggestions or recommendations provided by the user */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback resolution (e.g., OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Citizen, Developer, Admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or institution the user is associated with */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Contact address of the user */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feature (e.g., DEVELOPMENT, TESTING, LIVE) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the feature was last updated */,
  "development_start_date" TEXT /* Date the feature development started */,
  "development_end_date" TEXT /* Date the feature development is expected to end */,
  "assigned_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_features_assigned_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_developer_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_features_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the usage is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the application */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the application was used */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., VIEW, INTERACT) */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., MOBILE, DESKTOP) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_usage_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES application_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PROGRESS, FINAL) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the report approval (e.g., PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED) */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)
